title: erucastrum benacense
intro: Erucastrum benacense, also known as the alpine rocket, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant's health benefits include relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as supporting digestion and reducing fever. Erucastrum benacense can be consumed in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and infusions in the form of capsules or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and optimal dosages.
